title: Memory Management
cogneeStatusSubtitle: Knowledge graph projection and federated recall status
clickToEdit: Click a file on the left to edit
deleteFileConfirm: Delete note "{{name}}"? This cannot be undone.

daily.newNoteHint: No note for this date — it will be created on save
daily.retentionHint: Daily notes older than {{days}} days are distilled into long-term memory and deleted (adjustable in Config)
daily.deleteConfirm: Delete the note for {{date}}? This cannot be undone.

memoryConfigSubtitle: Adjust memory search, management and consolidation parameters

configDescs.vector_search_batch_size: Batch parallel search when exceeding this count
configDescs.memory_recall_top_k: Max entries returned by passive memory recall
configDescs.memory_recall_min_score: Memories below this score will not be recalled
configDescs.memory_warn_threshold: Warn when a single type exceeds this count
configDescs.entity_merge_threshold: Suggest merging when entity memories exceed this count
configDescs.reflection_merge_threshold: Suggest merging when reflection memories exceed this count
configDescs.notes_events_retention_days: Days to keep events daily notes; expired notes are distilled and archived, then deleted
configDescs.notes_events_distill_enabled: Distill expired daily notes into long-term memory before deletion (delete directly when off)

cogneeDescs.enabled: Enable the optional Cognee backend; automatically falls back when unavailable
cogneeDescs.sync_enabled: Project memory creates, updates, and deletes to Cognee asynchronously
cogneeDescs.recall_enabled: Query Cognee in parallel and fuse results with native recall
cogneeDescs.dataset_prefix: Prefix used to isolate global, user, and group datasets
cogneeDescs.timeout_seconds: Maximum wait time for each Cognee API call
cogneeDescs.sync_batch_size: Persistent projection jobs consumed per batch
cogneeDescs.max_retries: Jobs enter the failed queue after this limit
cogneeDescs.native_weight: RRF weight for SQLite, FTS, and embedding results
cogneeDescs.cognee_weight: RRF weight for Cognee graph and vector results
cogneeDescs.pipeline_timeout_seconds: Maximum wait for long pipelines like cognify/memify
cogneeDescs.improve_interval_seconds: Minimum interval between graph improves per dataset; <=0 disables auto improve
cogneeDescs.sync_interval_seconds: Poll interval of the sync worker when idle
cogneeDescs.rrf_k: Smoothing constant of Reciprocal Rank Fusion; larger values smooth rank gaps
cogneeDescs.recall_pool_multiplier: Candidate pool amplification per source in federated recall

selectGoalHint: Select a goal from the list to view details
recurringHint: When enabled, all steps auto-reset to pending when the goal is marked complete, and the goal becomes active again. The AI advances this goal continuously within its heartbeat cycle — no fixed time interval.

cognee.statusSubtitle: Availability, model mapping and sync state of the knowledge-graph backend
cognee.backfillConfirm: Enqueue all historical memories for Cognee sync? Large datasets will keep consuming model quota.
cognee.chatConfigSubtitle: The LLM used by Cognee for knowledge-graph extraction, independent of the main chat model
cognee.embeddingConfigSubtitle: The embedding model used by Cognee for text vectorization
cognee.sourceAutoDesc: Automatically picks a compatible model from Model Management (prefers openai protocol); follows main model changes
cognee.sourceModelDesc: Pins a model from Model Management; switching the main chat model does not affect Cognee
cognee.sourceCustomDesc: Fully custom provider / endpoint / API key
cognee.instructorModeHint: Thinking-mode endpoints reject tool_choice; choose json_mode for them
cognee.reasoningEffortHint: Only affects thinking models; lower values speed up extraction, off attempts to disable thinking
cognee.datasetsSubtitle: Memory datasets in Cognee; graph improve can be triggered manually
cognee.generalSubtitle: Projection sync and federated recall parameters
cognee.hotApplyNote: Applied immediately after save, no restart required
cognee.reasoningModelHint: This is a thinking model: its thinking budget is auto-capped to prevent output truncation, but extraction costs more — a non-thinking model is recommended

docs.title: Document Index
docs.empty: No documents yet. PDF / Word / TXT / MD are supported; uploaded files are parsed, indexed and included in memory recall.
docs.deleteConfirm: Delete document "{{name}}"? Its index and file on disk will also be removed.
